canonical_definition: An English-language benchmark derived from the 2023 Chinese National College Entrance Examination (Gaokao) to assess mathematical reasoning.

relationships.paper: Can Large Language Models Be Good Language Teachers?
relationships.evidence: “We assess models’ mathematical reasoning on synthetic data using diverse benchmarks, including GSM8K (Cobbe et al., 2021), MATH-500(MATH) (Lightman et al., 2023), MathQA (Amini et al., 2019), OlympiadBench-Math(Olympiad) (He et al., 2024), OmniMATH(Omni) (Gao et al., 2024), Gaokao 2023 En(Gaokao) (Liao et al., 2024), and CollegeMath(College) (Tang et al., 2024).”
